mapper.select:
/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCustomerOrderCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD A
INNER JOIN( SELECT MAX(X.COHDKEY) AS COHDKEY , X.OWKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_DT X WHERE X.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND X.DLVYEXPCTDAY BETWEEN #{orHddateFr} AND #{orHddateTo} AND X.ICKEY IN
#{item}
GROUP BY X.COHDKEY,X.OWKEY ) B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = B.COHDKEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON A.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND A.ORDERTYPECD = OT.ORDERTYPECD
INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_WBLNO SW ON A.OWKEY = SW.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = SW.COHDKEY
#{SEARCH_CONDITION}
AND A.WKSTATUS != #{cancelYn}
AND OT.IBYN = 'Y'
AND OT.OBYN = 'Y'
AND SW.WBLNO = #{wblno}
AND A.ORDERTYPECD IN
#{orType}
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYER, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{nameVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPNM, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{nameVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLER, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{nameVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYERTEL01, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYERTEL02, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND A.BUYERZIPCD LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYERADDRHD, #{encryptKeyOms}) || pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYERADDRDT, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPTEL01, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPTEL02, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND A.RECPZIPCD LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPADDRHD, #{encryptKeyOms}) || pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPADDRDT, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLERTEL01, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLERTEL02, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND A.RECALLERZIPCD LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLERADDRHD, #{encryptKeyOms}) || pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLERADDRDT, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCustomerOrderList */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.OWKEY , B.OWNM AS OWNM , A.DLVYEXPCTDAY , A.ORDERISTDAY , ( CASE WHEN OT.IBYN = 'Y' AND OT.OBYN = 'N' THEN '입고' WHEN OT.IBYN = 'N' AND OT.OBYN = 'Y' THEN '출고' ELSE '' END ) AS IODIV , A.ORDERTYPECD , A.EXTORDERTYPECD , A.WKSTATUS , A.COHDKEY , pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYER, #{encKey}) AS BUYER , pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPNM, #{encKey}) AS RECPNM , pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLER, #{encKey}) AS RECALLER , A.ACKEY , E.ACNM AS ACNM , A.DLVYACKEY , C.ACNM AS DLVYACNM , A.DLVYMETHDCD , A.NISCNLRNGDIV , A.NISYN , A.CLAIMNO , A.RIRSNCD , A.ADDCMT01 , A.CMT , A.ORGORDERKEY , A.ORDERERRCD , A.ORDERERRCMT , (SELECT X.SOHDKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD X WHERE X.COHDKEY = A.COHDKEY AND X.WKSTATUS!=#{soCancelStatus}) AS SOHDKEY , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD A LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_OW B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_AC C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.DLVYACKEY = C.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_AC D ON A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.STOREKEY = D.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_AC E ON A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ACKEY = E.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT F ON A.FROMTOCTKEY = F.CTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT G ON A.CTKEY = G.CTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD H ON A.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = H.COHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON A.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND A.ORDERTYPECD = OT.ORDERTYPECD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON A.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND A.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTORDERTYPECD AND A.ORDERTYPECD = OM.ORDERTYPECD AND OM.DELYN = 'N'
INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_WBLNO SW ON A.OWKEY = SW.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = SW.COHDKEY
INNER JOIN( SELECT MAX(X.COHDKEY) AS COHDKEY , X.OWKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_DT X WHERE X.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND X.DLVYEXPCTDAY BETWEEN #{orHddateFr} AND #{orHddateTo} AND X.ICKEY IN
#{item}
GROUP BY X.COHDKEY,X.OWKEY ) B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = B.COHDKEY
#{SEARCH_CONDITION}
AND A.WKSTATUS != #{cancelYn}
AND OT.IBYN = 'Y'
AND OT.OBYN = 'Y'
AND SW.WBLNO = #{wblno}
AND A.ORDERTYPECD IN
#{orType}
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYER, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{nameVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPNM, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{nameVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLER, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{nameVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYERTEL01, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYERTEL02, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND A.BUYERZIPCD LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYERADDRHD, #{encryptKeyOms}) || pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.BUYERADDRDT, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPTEL01, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPTEL02, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND A.RECPZIPCD LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPADDRHD, #{encryptKeyOms}) || pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECPADDRDT, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLERTEL01, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLERTEL02, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND A.RECALLERZIPCD LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
AND pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLERADDRHD, #{encryptKeyOms}) || pkg_crypto$decrypt(A.RECALLERADDRDT, #{encryptKeyOms}) LIKE '%' || #{infoVal} || '%'
ORDER BY A.UPDATEDATE DESC #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}

/* oms-master-owOrTypeMapp-sql-oracle.xml selectOrMappType */ SELECT ORDERTYPECD AS FIELD1 , ORDERTYPECD||':'||ORDERTYPENM AS FIELD2 FROM TORDER_MST_ORTYPE WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY ORDERTYPECD

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCustomerOrderDetailList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.OWKEY , A.COHDKEY , A.CODTKEY , A.WKSTATUS , A.ICKEY , MI.ICNM , SW.DLVRYCORP , SW.WBLNO , B.ORGORDERKEY , A.ORDERERRCD , A.ORDERERRCMT , A.DLVYCNTRUNIT , COALESCE(IR.REQORDERQTY, 0) AS REQORDERQTY , COALESCE(BO.B2BOBQTY, 0) AS B2BOBQTY , COALESCE(IH.RIIMPSQTY, 0) AS RIIMPSQTY , IH.HOLDRSNCD , IH.HOLDPRCSDTCONT , IH.PRCSISTTYPECD , IH.PRCSISTDTCONT , COALESCE(A.ORDERISTQTY, 0) AS ORDERISTQTY , COALESCE(A.MALBOXQTY, 0) AS MALBOXQTY , COALESCE(A.MALPCSQTY, 0) AS MALPCSQTY , COALESCE(SD.CNFRMQTY, 0) AS CNFRMQTY , COALESCE(SW.WBLCNT, 0) AS WBLCNT , COALESCE(II.IMGCNT, 0) AS IMGCNT , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_DT A INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = B.COHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON A.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = SD.COHDKEY AND A.CODTKEY = SD.CODTKEY AND SD.CNLYN = 'N' LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_IC MI ON A.OWKEY = MI.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = MI.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.SOHDKEY , T.OWKEY , T.DLVRYCORP , COUNT(T.WBLNO) AS WBLCNT , CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 1 THEN MIN(T.WBLNO)||' 외 '||(COUNT(1)-1)||'건' ELSE MIN(T.WBLNO) END AS WBLNO FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY , X.SOHDKEY AS SOHDKEY , X.DLVRYCORP , X.WBLNO FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_WBLNO X WHERE X.OWKEY = 'DAISO' GROUP BY X.SOHDKEY, X.OWKEY, X.WBLNO, X.DLVRYCORP ) T GROUP BY T.SOHDKEY, T.OWKEY, T.DLVRYCORP ) SW ON A.OWKEY = SW.OWKEY AND SD.SOHDKEY = SW.SOHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDER IR ON A.OWKEY = IR.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = IR.ICKEY AND B.CTKEY = IR.CTKEY AND B.DLVYEXPCTDAY = IR.IBEXPCTDAY AND B.ORGORDERKEY = IR.REQORDERNO LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_B2B_ORDER BO ON A.OWKEY = BO.OWKEY AND A.REQORDERNO = BO.REQORDERNO AND A.SHMISTNO = BO.SHMISTNO LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_HOLD IH ON A.OWKEY = IH.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = IH.COHDKEY AND A.CODTKEY = IH.CODTKEY AND B.CLAIMNO = IH.CLAIMNO LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.COHDKEY , T.OWKEY , T.CLAIMNO , COUNT(T.IMGURL) AS IMGCNT FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY , X.COHDKEY , X.CLAIMNO , X.IMGURL FROM TORDER_INFO_IMG X WHERE X.OWKEY = 'DAISO' GROUP BY X.COHDKEY, X.OWKEY, X.IMGURL, X.CLAIMNO ) T GROUP BY T.COHDKEY, T.OWKEY, T.CLAIMNO ) II ON A.OWKEY = II.OWKEY AND SD.COHDKEY = II.COHDKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.COHDKEY = #{cohdkey} ORDER BY LPAD(A.CODTKEY::TEXT, 20, '0') ASC , A.UPDATEDATE DESC

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCoWblIcInfo */ SELECT CD.COMDTNM AS DLVRYCORP , B.WBLNO , B.ICKEY , C.ICNM , B.DLVRYQTY , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_DT A INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_WBLNO B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = B.COHDKEY AND (A.OLNICKEY = B.ICKEY OR B.ICKEY IS NULL) INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_IC C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = D.COHDKEY AND A.CODTKEY = D.CODTKEY AND B.SOHDKEY = D.SOHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_COM_DT CD ON A.OWKEY = CD.OWKEY AND B.DLVRYCORP = CD.COMDTKEY AND CD.COMHDKEY = 'CD_00414' WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.COHDKEY = #{cohdkey}
AND A.CODTKEY = #{codtkey}

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectRiImgInfo */ WITH T_CODT AS ( SELECT CD.OWKEY, CD.COHDKEY, CD.ICKEY, MI.ICNM , COUNT(*) OVER(ORDER BY CD.CODTKEY) AS NUM , CD.INSERTDATE , CD.INSERTURKEY , CD.UPDATEDATE , CD.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_DT CD INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_IC MI ON CD.OWKEY = MI.OWKEY AND CD.ICKEY = MI.ICKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND CD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CD.COHDKEY = #{cohdkey} ), T_IMG AS ( SELECT CH.OWKEY, CH.COHDKEY, II.IMGSEQ, II.IMGURL, II.INSPECABNORYN , COUNT(*) OVER(ORDER BY II.IMGSEQ) AS NUM FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_IMG II ON CH.OWKEY = II.OWKEY AND CH.COHDKEY = II.COHDKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND CH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CH.COHDKEY = #{cohdkey} ) SELECT COALESCE(CD.OWKEY, IMG.OWKEY) AS OWKEY , COALESCE(CD.COHDKEY, IMG.COHDKEY) AS COHDKEY , CD.ICKEY , CD.ICNM , IMG.INSPECABNORYN , IMG.IMGURL , CD.INSERTDATE , CD.INSERTURKEY , CD.UPDATEDATE , CD.UPDATEURKEY FROM T_CODT CD FULL OUTER JOIN T_IMG IMG ON IMG.OWKEY = CD.OWKEY AND IMG.COHDKEY = CD.COHDKEY AND IMG.NUM = CD.NUM

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemCodeUnitType */ SELECT A.ICUNITTYPE AS FIELD1 , C.ADCDDTNM AS FIELD2 , A.ICKEY AS FIELD3 , COALESCE(A.DEPTH, A.DEPTH) AS FIELD4 , COALESCE(A.WIDTH, A.WIDTH) AS FIELD5 , COALESCE(A.HEIGHT, A.HEIGHT) AS FIELD6 , COALESCE(A.WEIGHT, A.WEIGHT) AS FIELD7 , COALESCE(A.VOL, A.VOL) AS FIELD8 , A.ICUNITQTY AS FIELD9 FROM TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE A LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXCT B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND B.CTKEY = #{fromtoctkey} LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT AD_DT.ADCDDTKEY , AD_DT.ADCDDTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_HD AD_HD INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT AD_DT ON AD_HD.ADCDHDKEY = AD_DT.ADCDHDKEY AND AD_HD.ADCDHDKEY ='ICUTTYPE' AND AD_DT.LAKEY = #{slakey} ) C ON A.ICUNITTYPE = C.ADCDDTKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = #{icutkey}

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemCodeUnitType */ SELECT A.ICUNITTYPE AS FIELD1 , B.ADCDDTNM AS FIELD2 , A.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD3 FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT B.ADCDDTKEY , B.ADCDDTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_HD A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT B ON A.ADCDHDKEY = B.ADCDHDKEY AND A.ADCDHDKEY ='ICUTTYPE' AND B.LAKEY = #{slakey} ) B ON A.ICUNITTYPE = B.ADCDDTKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey}

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectOrderTypeCodeCheck */ SELECT OWKEY , ORDERTYPECD , HDDTDIV , COCOLUMN , REQRDYN , DELYN FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_CHK WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND REQRDYN = 'Y' AND OWKEY = #{owkey}

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCoExcelHeaderList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , UPLOADKEY , ACKEY , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , CTKEY , DELIVERY_HD_DT , OR_HD_DT , OR_TYPE_CD , EXTORDERTYPECD , COMMENTS , EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , TO_CTKEY /*TO_센터*/ , SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ , MAX(ORDER_ERROR_CD) AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , MAX(ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS) AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_CUSTOMER WHERE UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey} AND DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UPLOADKEY, ACKEY , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , CTKEY ,DELIVERY_HD_DT ,OR_HD_DT ,OR_TYPE_CD , EXTORDERTYPECD , COMMENTS , EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , TO_CTKEY /*TO_센터*/ , SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ ORDER BY DELIVERY_HD_DT

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectCoExcelHeaderList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , UPLOADKEY , ACKEY , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , CTKEY , DELIVERY_HD_DT , OR_HD_DT , OR_TYPE_CD , EXTORDERTYPECD , COMMENTS , EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , TO_CTKEY /*TO_센터*/ , SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ , MAX(ORDER_ERROR_CD) AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , MAX(ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS) AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_CUSTOMER WHERE UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey} AND DELYN = 'N' AND ORDER_ERROR_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY UPLOADKEY, ACKEY , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , CTKEY ,DELIVERY_HD_DT ,OR_HD_DT ,OR_TYPE_CD , EXTORDERTYPECD , COMMENTS , EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , TO_CTKEY /*TO_센터*/ , SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ ORDER BY DELIVERY_HD_DT

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCoExcelDetailList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , UPLOADKEY , UPLOADSEQ , ACKEY , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , CTKEY , DELIVERY_HD_DT , OR_HD_DT , OR_TYPE_CD , EXTORDERTYPECD , COMMENTS , ICKEY , UNIT , ORDERQTY , DT_COMMENTS , EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /*고객주문상세번호*/ , TO_CTKEY /*TO_센터*/ , SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ , IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ , BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_CUSTOMER WHERE UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey} AND COALESCE(ACKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(#{ackey}, 'X') AND COALESCE(STORE_KEY, 'X') = COALESCE(#{storeKey}, 'X') AND COALESCE(DELIVERY_KEY, 'X') = COALESCE(#{deliveryKey}, 'X') AND COALESCE(CTKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(#{ctkey}, 'X') AND COALESCE(DELIVERY_HD_DT, 'X') = COALESCE(#{deliveryHdDt}, 'X') AND COALESCE(OR_HD_DT, 'X') = COALESCE(#{orHdDt}, 'X') AND COALESCE(OR_TYPE_CD, 'X') = COALESCE(#{orTypeCd}, 'X') AND COALESCE(EXTORDERTYPECD, 'X') = COALESCE(#{extordertypecd}, 'X') AND COALESCE(COMMENTS, 'X') = COALESCE(#{comments}, 'X') AND COALESCE(EXTERNORDERKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(#{externorderkey}, 'X') AND COALESCE(TO_CTKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(#{toCtkey}, 'X') AND COALESCE(SALESPERSON_ID, 'X') = COALESCE(#{salespersonId}, 'X') AND COALESCE(DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, 'X') = COALESCE(#{deliveryPersonId}, 'X') AND DELYN = 'N'
mapper.update:
/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - deleteExcelTempList */ UPDATE TORDER_UPLOAD_CUSTOMER TUM SET DELYN = 'Y' WHERE TUM.UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM (
SELECT #{item.uploadkey} AS UPLOADKEY , #{item.ackey} AS ACKEY , #{item.storeKey} AS STORE_KEY , #{item.deliveryKey} AS DELIVERY_KEY , #{item.ctkey} AS CTKEY , #{item.deliveryHdDt} AS DELIVERY_HD_DT , #{item.orHdDt} AS OR_HD_DT , #{item.orTypeCd} AS OR_TYPE_CD , #{item.extordertypecd} AS EXTORDERTYPECD , #{item.comments} AS COMMENTS , #{item.externorderkey} AS EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , #{item.toCtkey} AS TO_CTKEY /*TO_센터*/ , #{item.salespersonId} AS SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , #{item.deliveryPersonId} AS DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ ) T WHERE T.UPLOADKEY = TUM.UPLOADKEY AND COALESCE(T.ACKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.ACKEY, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.STORE_KEY, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.STORE_KEY, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.DELIVERY_KEY, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.DELIVERY_KEY, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.CTKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.CTKEY, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.DELIVERY_HD_DT, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.DELIVERY_HD_DT, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.OR_HD_DT, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.OR_HD_DT, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.OR_TYPE_CD, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.OR_TYPE_CD, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.EXTORDERTYPECD, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.EXTORDERTYPECD, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.COMMENTS, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.COMMENTS, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.EXTERNORDERKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.EXTERNORDERKEY, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.TO_CTKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.TO_CTKEY, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.SALESPERSON_ID, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.SALESPERSON_ID, 'X') AND COALESCE(T.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, 'X') = COALESCE(TUM.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, 'X') )
mapper.insert: /* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - insertCustomerOrderExcelHeader */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_HD ( OWKEY , CUSTOMERORDERKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , OR_TYPE_CD , DELIVERY_HD_DT , OR_HD_DT , WKSTATUS , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , ACKEY , REFERENCEKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , SALESPERSON_ID , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , COMMENTS , CANCEL_YN , TO_CTKEY , CTKEY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , OCCURRENCE_ORDER_YN ) SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_co_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS CUSTOMERORDERKEY , A.EXTORDERTYPECD , A.OR_TYPE_CD , A.DELIVERY_HD_DT , A.OR_HD_DT , #{wkstatus} AS WKSTATUS , A.DELIVERY_KEY , A.STORE_KEY , A.ACKEY , A.UPLOADKEY AS REFERENCEKEY , A.EXTERNORDERKEY , A.SALESPERSON_ID , A.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , A.COMMENTS , 'N' AS CANCEL_YN , A.TO_CTKEY , A.CTKEY , #{sysdate} AS INSERTDATE , #{surkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{surkey} AS UPDATEURKEY , 'N' AS SAPTRANSFAILYN , 'N' AS OCCURRENCE_ORDER_YN FROM (SELECT UPLOADKEY , ACKEY , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , CTKEY , DELIVERY_HD_DT , OR_HD_DT , OR_TYPE_CD , EXTORDERTYPECD , COMMENTS , EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , TO_CTKEY /*TO_센터*/ , SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_CUSTOMER WHERE UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey} AND ORDER_ERROR_CD IS NULL AND ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS IS NULL AND DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UPLOADKEY , ACKEY , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , CTKEY ,DELIVERY_HD_DT ,OR_HD_DT ,OR_TYPE_CD , EXTORDERTYPECD , COMMENTS , EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , TO_CTKEY /*TO_센터*/ , SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ ) A

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - insertCustomerOrderExcelDetail */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_DT ( OWKEY , CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , WKSTATUS , ICKEY , OR_HD_DT , DELIVERY_HD_DT , ORDERQTY , UNIT , CONVERTQTY , SALEUNIT , OB_COSTPRICE , INDIAMT , VAT , EXTDT , PRODUCT_LOT , PRODUCT_DT , TOTALWEIGHT , WEIGHTUNIT , VOLUME , VOLUMEUNIT , LOGGRPCD , EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , COMMENTS , CANCEL_YN , CANCEL_ID , REFERENCETYPE , REFERENCEKEY , REFERENCEDTKEY , IC_RATE , BONUS_IC_RATE , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT B.OWKEY , B.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY B.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ORDER BY A.ICKEY ) * 10 AS CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , B.EXTORDERTYPECD , B.WKSTATUS , A.ICKEY , B.OR_HD_DT , B.DELIVERY_HD_DT , A.ORDERQTY , A.UNIT , A.ORDERQTY * D.ICUTQTY AS CONVERTQTY , '' AS SALEUNIT , '' AS OB_COSTPRICE , '' AS INDIAMT , '' AS VAT , '' AS EXTDT , '' AS PRODUCT_LOT , '' AS PRODUCT_DT , A.ORDERQTY * COALESCE(MU.WEIGHT, COALESCE(D.WEIGHT, 0)) AS TOTAL_WEIGHT , 'G' AS WEIGHTUNIT , A.ORDERQTY * COALESCE(MU.VOL, COALESCE(D.VOL, 0)) AS TOTAL_VOLUME , 'MM3' AS VOLUMEUNIT , C.UDF2 /* 온도 */ , A.EXTERNORDERKEY , A.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , A.DT_COMMENTS , 'N' AS CANCEL_YN , '' AS CANCEL_ID , '' AS REFERENCETYPE , #{uploadkey} AS REFERENCEKEY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY B.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ORDER BY A.ICKEY ) * 10 AS REFERENCEDTKEY , A.IC_RATE , A.BONUS_IC_RATE , '' AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , '' AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_CUSTOMER A INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD B ON COALESCE(A.ACKEY, 'XX') = COALESCE(B.ACKEY, 'XX') AND COALESCE(A.DELIVERY_KEY, 'XX') = COALESCE(B.DELIVERY_KEY, 'XX') AND COALESCE(A.STORE_KEY, 'XX') = COALESCE(B.STORE_KEY, 'XX') AND COALESCE(A.CTKEY, 'XX') = COALESCE(B.CTKEY, 'XX') AND A.DELIVERY_HD_DT = B.DELIVERY_HD_DT AND A.OR_HD_DT = B.OR_HD_DT AND A.OR_TYPE_CD = B.OR_TYPE_CD AND A.EXTORDERTYPECD = B.EXTORDERTYPECD AND COALESCE(A.COMMENTS, 'XX') = COALESCE(B.COMMENTS, 'XX') AND COALESCE(A.EXTERNORDERKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(B.EXTERNORDERKEY, 'X') AND COALESCE(A.TO_CTKEY, 'X') = COALESCE(B.TO_CTKEY, 'X') AND COALESCE(A.SALESPERSON_ID, 'X') = COALESCE(B.SALESPERSON_ID, 'X') AND COALESCE(A.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, 'X') = COALESCE(B.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, 'X') LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC C ON B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE D ON B.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND C.ICUNITKEY = D.ICUNITKEY AND A.UNIT = D.ICUNITTYPE LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICMEASUREMENT MU ON D.OWKEY = MU.OWKEY AND D.ICUNITKEY = MU.ICUNITKEY AND D.ICUNITTYPE= MU.ICUNITTYPE AND A.CTKEY = MU.CTKEY WHERE A.UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey} AND B.REFERENCEKEY = #{uploadkey} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ORDER_ERROR_CD IS NULL AND A.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS IS NULL
mapper.select: /* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCustomerOrderExcelList */ SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , T.UPLOADKEY , T.UPLOADSEQ , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY T.UPLOADKEY , T.ACKEY , T.STORE_KEY , T.DELIVERY_KEY , T.CTKEY , T.DELIVERY_HD_DT , T.OR_HD_DT , T.OR_TYPE_CD , T.EXTORDERTYPECD , T.COMMENTS , T.EXTERNORDERKEY , T.TO_CTKEY , T.SALESPERSON_ID , T.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID ) AS UPLOADGRPKEY , T.ACKEY , T.DELIVERY_KEY , T.STORE_KEY , T.CTKEY , T.TO_CTKEY , T.DELIVERY_HD_DT , T.OR_HD_DT , T.OR_TYPE_CD , T.EXTORDERTYPECD , T.COMMENTS , T.ICKEY , T.UNIT , T.ORDERQTY , T.DT_COMMENTS , T.EXTERNORDERKEY , T.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , T.SALESPERSON_ID /*영업사원ID*/ , T.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID /*배송사원ID*/ , T.IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ , T.BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , T.ICRATETYPE , COALESCE(DP.ORDER_ERROR_CD, T.ORDER_ERROR_CD) AS ERROR_CODE , COALESCE(DP.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS, T.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS) AS SERVER_MESSAGE , CASE WHEN DP.ORDER_ERROR_CD IS NULL THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS IS_SUCCESS , T.DELYN , T.INSERTDATE , T.INSERTURKEY , T.UPDATEDATE , T.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_CUSTOMER T LEFT JOIN ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , #{duplErrorCode} AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , #{duplErrorMessage} AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_CUSTOMER WHERE UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey} AND EXTERNORDERKEY IS NOT NULL AND EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY IS NOT NULL GROUP BY EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY HAVING COUNT(1) > 1 ) DP ON T.EXTERNORDERKEY = DP.EXTERNORDERKEY AND T.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = DP.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY WHERE T.UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey}

SELECT OWKEY , CUSTOMERORDERKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , OR_TYPE_CD , DELIVERY_HD_DT , OR_HD_DT , WKSTATUS , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , BILLKEY , PAYERKEY , ACKEY , DELIVERY_NO , PO_TYPE , REFERENCETYPE , REFERENCEKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , SALESPERSON_ID , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , COMMENTS , ADDCOMMENTS , CANCEL_YN , CANCEL_ID , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , EDI_YN , TO_CTKEY , CTKEY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND REFERENCEKEY = #{uploadkey}

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCustomerOrderReturnHd */ SELECT A.OWKEY , F.OWNM AS OWNAME , A.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , A.DELIVERY_HD_DT AS PRE_OR_HD_DT , A.DELIVERY_KEY , C.ACNM AS DELIVERY_NAME , A.STORE_KEY , D.ACNM AS STORE_NAME , A.STORE_KEY AS RECEIVEKEY , D.ACNM AS RECEIVENAME , NULL AS COMMENTS , A.CTKEY , A.TO_CTKEY AS MV_CTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.DELIVERY_KEY = C.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER D ON A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.STORE_KEY = D.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW F ON A.OWKEY = F.OWKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = #{customerorderkey} AND A.DELIVERY_HD_DT = #{deliveryHdDt}

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectCustomerOrderReturnDt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.OWKEY , A.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AS ORG_CUSTOMERORDERKEY , A.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY AS ORG_CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , A.ICKEY , B.ICNM , A.EXTERNORDERKEY , A.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , CASE WHEN COALESCE(C.ICUNITQTY, 0)=0 THEN 0 ELSE TRUNC(SD.CFQTY / C.ICUNITQTY, 3) END AS ORGCFQTY , A.UNIT AS ORG_UNIT , C.ICUNITQTY , SD.CFQTY AS CONVERTQTY , '0' AS COVQTY , '0' AS EXQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_DT A JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON A.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND A.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND A.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY AND COALESCE(SD.OR_CANCEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE C ON B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ICUNITKEY AND A.UNIT = C.ICUNITTYPE WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = #{customerorderkey}

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectOwnerOrderType */ SELECT A.OWKEY , A.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AS FIELD1 , A.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD||':'||A.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_NM AS FIELD2 FROM TORDER_MST_EXTERN A WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.DELYN ='N' AND A.PREORDERYN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - saveCustomerOrderReturn */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_PREORDERS ( OWKEY , PREKEY , ORG_CUSTOMERORDERKEY , ORG_CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , RECEIVEKEY , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , ACKEY , CTKEY , MV_CTKEY , PRE_OR_HD_DT , EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD , ICKEY , EXQTY , COVQTY , ORG_UNIT , COMMENTS , SAPTRANSYN , SAPTRANSFAILYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , OR_HDDATE ) SELECT TB.OWKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_preorders')::TEXT, 8, '0') AS PREKEY , TB.ORG_CUSTOMERORDERKEY , TB.ORG_CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , TB.EXTERNORDERKEY , TB.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , TB.RECEIVEKEY , TB.DELIVERY_KEY , TB.STORE_KEY , TB.ACKEY , TB.CTKEY , TB.MV_CTKEY , TB.PRE_OR_HD_DT , TB.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD , TB.ICKEY , TB.EXQTY , TB.COVQTY , TB.ORG_UNIT , TB.COMMENTS , TB.SAPTRANSYN , TB.SAPTRANSFAILYN , TB.INSERTDATE , TB.INSERTURKEY , TB.UPDATEDATE , TB.UPDATEURKEY , TB.OR_HDDATE FROM
SELECT #{item.owkey} AS OWKEY , #{item.orgCustomerorderkey} AS ORG_CUSTOMERORDERKEY , #{item.orgCustomerorderdtkey} AS ORG_CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , #{item.externorderkey} AS EXTERNORDERKEY , #{item.externorderdetailkey} AS EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , #{receivekey} AS RECEIVEKEY , #{deliveryKey} AS DELIVERY_KEY , #{storeKey} AS STORE_KEY , #{ackey} AS ACKEY , #{ctkey} AS CTKEY , #{mvCtkey} AS MV_CTKEY , #{item.preOrHdDt} AS PRE_OR_HD_DT , #{item.externOrTypeCd} AS EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD , #{item.ickey} AS ICKEY , #{item.exqty} AS EXQTY , #{item.covqty} AS COVQTY , #{item.orgUnit} AS ORG_UNIT , #{comments} AS COMMENTS , #{saptransyn} AS SAPTRANSYN , #{saptransfailyn} AS SAPTRANSFAILYN , #{surkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{sysdate} AS INSERTDATE , #{surkey} AS UPDATEURKEY , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{preOrHdDt} AS OR_HDDATE TB

/* oms-order-customerOrder-sql-oracle.xml - insertCustomerOrderDtSplitList */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_DT ( OWKEY /*사용자 ID*/ , CUSTOMERORDERKEY /*사용자 명*/ , CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY /*사용자 그룹 코드*/ , EXTORDERTYPECD /*사용자 암호*/ , WKSTATUS /*유효 일자*/ , ICKEY /*국가별 언어 코드*/ , OR_HD_DT /*로그인실패카운터*/ , DELIVERY_HD_DT /*표준 시간대 코드*/ , ORDERQTY /*일광 절약 시간*/ , UNIT /*센터 코드*/ , CONVERTQTY /*화주 코드(M)*/ , SALEUNIT /*E-MAIL*/ , OB_COSTPRICE /*휴대폰 번호*/ , INDIAMT /*종료 일시*/ , VAT /*입력 일시*/ , EXTDT /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , PRODUCT_LOT /*수정 일시*/ , PRODUCT_DT /*수정 사용자 ID*/ , TOTALWEIGHT /*구분*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*상저온코드*/ , VOLUME /*사용자구분("0": 내부사용자, 그 외:외부사용자) - 관리기준코드:USRTYP*/ , VOLUMEUNIT /*Division 제약*/ , LOGGRPCD /**/ , EXTERNORDERKEY /**/ , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /**/ , COMMENTS /**/ , CANCEL_YN /**/ , CANCEL_ID /**/ , IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ , BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , REFERENCETYPE /**/ , REFERENCEKEY /**/ , REFERENCEDTKEY /**/ , ORDER_ERROR_CD /**/ , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS /**/ , INSERTDATE /**/ , INSERTURKEY /**/ , UPDATEDATE /*배차여부*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*행사유형*/ ) SELECT CD.OWKEY , CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ORDER BY CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY) * 10 AS CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , CD.EXTORDERTYPECD , CD.WKSTATUS , CD.ICKEY , CH.OR_HD_DT , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT , CD.ORDERQTY , CD.UNIT , CD.ORDERQTY * IU.ICUNITQTY AS CONVERTQTY , CD.SALEUNIT , CD.OB_COSTPRICE , CD.ORDERQTY * IU.ICUNITQTY * CD.OB_COSTPRICE AS INDIAMT , CASE WHEN CD.VAT>0 THEN ROUND(CD.ORDERQTY * IU.ICUNITQTY * CD.OB_COSTPRICE / 10, 0) ELSE 0 END AS VAT , CD.EXTDT , CD.PRODUCT_LOT , CD.PRODUCT_DT , CD.TOTALWEIGHT * 1000 AS TOTALWEIGHT /* 중량 G 단위로 인서트 */ , 'G' AS WEIGHTUNIT , CD.VOLUME * 1000000000 AS VOLUME /* CBM -> MM3로 변환해서 인서트 */ , CD.VOLUMEUNIT , CD.LOGGRPCD , CD.EXTERNORDERKEY , CD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , CD.COMMENTS , 'N' AS CANCEL_YN , NULL AS CANCEL_ID , CD.IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ , CD.BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , CD.REFERENCETYPE , CD.REFERENCEKEY , CD.REFERENCEDTKEY , NULL AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , NULL AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , CD.INSERTDATE , CD.INSERTURKEY , CD.UPDATEDATE , CD.UPDATEURKEY FROM (
SELECT #{item.owkey} AS OWKEY , #{item.customerorderkey} AS CUSTOMERORDERKEY , #{item.customerorderdtkey} AS CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , #{item.extordertypecd} AS EXTORDERTYPECD , #{item.wkstatus} AS WKSTATUS , #{item.ickey} AS ICKEY , #{item.orHdDt} AS OR_HD_DT , #{item.deliveryHdDt} AS DELIVERY_HD_DT , #{item.splitqty} AS ORDERQTY , #{item.icuttype} AS UNIT , #{item.convertqty} AS CONVERTQTY , #{item.saleunit} AS SALEUNIT , #{item.obCostprice} AS OB_COSTPRICE , #{item.indiamt} AS INDIAMT , #{item.vat} AS VAT , #{item.extdt} AS EXTDT , #{item.productLot} AS PRODUCT_LOT , #{item.productDt} AS PRODUCT_DT , #{item.totalweight} AS TOTALWEIGHT , #{item.weightunit} AS WEIGHTUNIT , #{item.volume} AS VOLUME , #{item.volumeunit} AS VOLUMEUNIT , #{item.loggrpcd} AS LOGGRPCD , #{item.externorderkey} AS EXTERNORDERKEY , #{item.externorderdetailkey} AS EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , #{item.comments} AS COMMENTS , #{cancleYn} AS CANCEL_YN , #{item.cancleId} AS CANCEL_ID , #{item.icRate} AS IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ , #{item.bonusIcRate} AS BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , #{item.referencetype} AS REFERENCETYPE , #{item.referencekey} AS REFERENCEKEY , #{item.referencedtkey} AS REFERENCEDTKEY , #{item.orderErrorCd} AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , #{item.orderErrorComments} AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , #{sysdate} AS INSERTDATE , #{surkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{surkey} AS UPDATEURKEY ) CD INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON CD.OWKEY = CH.OWKEY AND CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON CD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND CD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND CD.UNIT = IU.ICUNITTYPE
